title: nephrolepis pectinata var. occidentalis
intro: Nephrolepis pectinata var. occidentalis, also known as the western sword fern, is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which may help to lower blood pressure and prevent the spread of infections. Nephrolepis pectinata var. occidentalis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
